title: Quick egg pancake – frittata – 6 servings

seo.title: Quick egg pancake - frittata - 6 servings - Marinda Kook

html:
My son and his girlfriend visited us here in Hopefield last weekend. As a good mother should, I wanted to send them home with full tummies. So I made the egg pancake.

  • 6 eggs
  • 50 ml butter
  • 50 ml oil (any kind)
  • 250 ml bacon, cut into small pieces (just buy the ready-chopped bacon)
  • 1 onion, finely chopped
  • 20ml parsley, finely chopped
  • 20 ml rosemary leaves, finely chopped (remember you can snip the parsley and rosemary fine in a cup with kitchen scissors)
  • 250 ml chopped tomatoes (rosa tomatoes halved, or ordinary tomato cut finer)
  • 250 ml cheese of your choice (cheddar, blue cheese or whatever's in the fridge)

NOW:

  1. Heat your butter and oil together in the pan.
  2. Fry your onions and bacon together in the pan.
  3. Fry the tomato, parsley and rosemary together with the onions and bacon.
  4. Whisk the six eggs and pour that into the pan too. Pull the egg gently away from the sides bit by bit so it can cook through.
  5. Sprinkle the cheese over the egg pancake. It won't cook through fully from the top. Set your oven to grill and slide the pan quickly under the oven element.

Just too good, and plenty of people can eat it. My children went home fully satisfied with full tummies.
